rulings.Case Title: CATHERAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION VS. LARISA GARBAR et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 7, 2007, LINE 4, PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT RELATED TO DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE OF WAIVER AND LACHES. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF'S ARGUMENT AND EVIDENCE AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION HAS MERIT, THE RELIEF REQUESTED REQUIRES THE COURT TO WAIVE THE EVIDENCE BEFORE ISSUING A PERMANENT INJUNCTION. SINCE THERE WILL BE A TRIAL IN THIS CASE, THE TRIAL JUDGE WILL BE IN A FAR BETTER POSITION TO WEIGH THE EVIDENCE IN ASSESSING THE NEED FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: ARKADY GORELIK et al VS. MIKHAIL GORELIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To Amend Complaint, Supporting Declaration Of Svetlana Shirinvoa And Supporting Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 7, 2007, LINE 7, PLAINTIFF ARKADY GORELIK, IGOR GORELIK, ASYA GORELIK'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To Amend Complaint, Supporting Declaration Of Svetlana Shirinvoa And Supporting Memorandum IS DENIED. THE CLAIMS FOR ASSAULT AND BATTERY ALLEGEDLY AROSE IN MAY 2006 AND WERE NOT ALLEGED IN ANY WAY AS PART OF THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF ALLEGED OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT DIRECTED AT THE ELDERLY PARENTS, NO ALLEGATIONS WERE MADE OF PHYSICAL ABUSE OR NEGLECT WITHIN THE MEANING OF WELFARE & INSTITUTIONS CODE 15657. FINANCIAL ABUSE IS NOT A PART OF 15657. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: JERALD J. TISHKOFF VS. ALLEN TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motio Nfor Leave To File X-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 7, 2007, LINE 9, DEFENDANT ALLEN TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion for Leave To File X-Complaint IS GRANTED. IT IS A COMPULSORY COUNTERCLAIM. BAD FAITH HAS NOT BEEN SHOWN. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS GO TO THE MERITS AND CAN BE ADDRESSED BY PRE TRIAL MOTIONS OR AT TRIAL. =(302/PJM/X-SN)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD B FOX VS. BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA LIFE & HEALTH et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 7, 2007, LINE 10, DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA LIFE & HEALTH, CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN 10 DAYS AS TO CAUSE OF ACTIONS 1, 5, 8, 10 AND 11. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3, 6 AND 9. THERE IS NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION BY THEFT. AN ASSIGNMENT DOES NOT CREATE A FIDUCIARY DUTY AS TO 1ST AND 5TH CAUSE OF ACTIONS, PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS THAT DEFENDANT HAD ACTUAL KNOWLEDGE. THE COMPLAINT DOES EXPLAIN HOW DEFENDANT IS UNJUSTLY ENRICHED GIVEN THAT IT OWES THE FUNDS TO THE CLAIMANT OR MUST ESCHEAT THE FUNDS TO THE STATE AFTER 7 YEARS. IF PLAINTIFF IS ABLE TO STATE A CLAIM FOR CONVERSION, PLAINTIFF MAY BE ABLE TO STATE A CLAIM FOR UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES. =(302/PJM/AY)
